calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petitioners Payden Bullis And Rene Rojas Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Enter Judgment Thereon
Off Calendar Mar-10-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONERS PAYDEN BULLIS and RENE ROJAS' unopposed "Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Enter Judgment Thereon" is granted.

Order and judgment are signed.

Judge: Richard Ulmer, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
